mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO wishlists(user_id, product_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.seller_id, p.name, p.description, p.category, p.price, p.stock_qty, p.thumbnail_url, p.expiration_date, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM wishlists w JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.wishlist_id DESC
